answer:
Fathom offers an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects your meeting data to AI assistants [1]. You can access this official server via the URL https://api.fathom.ai/mcp [1].

In addition to the official server, various community-maintained MCP servers are available on GitHub, offering features like enhanced analytics, full-text transcript searching, and webhook management [2][3][4][5]. These implementations generally require a Fathom API key for authentication [2][6][3][7]. Typical tools provided across these implementations include:

* list_meetings: Filter meetings by date, team, or participants [2][8][5].
* get_transcript: Retrieve full meeting transcripts [2][6][8].
* get_summary: Access AI-generated meeting summaries [2][6][7].
* list_teams/list_team_members: Manage and explore organizational team structures [2][3][8].
